matchingDescription: Android smartphone with AI photography features, consumer mobile device

variants.text: The Oppo Reno14 F 5G features AI Flash Photography and AI-powered photo editing, helping every shot look its best in any lighting.
The Oppo Reno14 F 5G's Iridescent Mermaid Design stands out — a smartphone that's as much a style statement as a daily tool.
Capture intricate close-up detail with the Oppo Reno14 F 5G's 2MP Macro camera, paired with AI-powered editing for sharper results.
The Oppo Reno14 F 5G combines fast 5G connectivity with AI Flash Photography — built for users who want speed and standout photos.
Looking for a smartphone upgrade? The Oppo Reno14 F 5G offers AI photo editing, a striking design, and 5G — all in one device.
